message:
style(cli): apply gofmt formatting to CLI command files

Apply consistent Go formatting across all CLI command implementations
using gofmt. These changes ensure the codebase follows Go's canonical
style guidelines.

Changes include:
- Remove trailing whitespace from blank lines throughout all files
- Standardize line spacing between function blocks
- Normalize indentation consistency

Files formatted:
- add.go: Agent addition command (12 formatting fixes)
- analytics.go: Analytics/metrics commands (36 formatting fixes)
- cass.go: CASS integration commands (20 formatting fixes)
- grep.go: Code search functionality (24 formatting fixes)
- health.go: Health check commands (8 formatting fixes)
- mail.go: Agent mail integration (removed trailing newline)
- pipeline.go: Pipeline orchestration (30 formatting fixes)
- plugins.go: Plugin management (8 formatting fixes)
- quick.go: Quick-start commands (6 formatting fixes)
- quota.go: Quota monitoring (2 formatting fixes)
- rotate.go: Log rotation commands (2 formatting fixes)
- scan.go: Project scanning (34 formatting fixes)
- send.go: Message sending (4 formatting fixes)
- session_persist.go: Session persistence (26 formatting fixes)
- spawn.go: Agent spawning (4 formatting fixes)
- template.go: Template management (14 formatting fixes)
- upgrade.go: Self-upgrade functionality (16 formatting fixes)

This is part of a broader gofmt cleanup effort to ensure consistent
code style across the entire NTM codebase.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

-	Period          string                    `json:"period"`

+	Period         string                `json:"period"`
+	TotalSessions  int                   `json:"total_sessions"`
+	TotalAgents    int                   `json:"total_agents"`
+	TotalPrompts   int                   `json:"total_prompts"`
+	TotalCharsSent int                   `json:"total_chars_sent"`
+	TotalTokensEst int                   `json:"total_tokens_estimated"`
+	AgentBreakdown map[string]AgentStats `json:"agent_breakdown"`
+	SessionDetails []SessionSummary      `json:"sessions,omitempty"`
+	ErrorCount     int                   `json:"error_count"`
+	ErrorTypes     map[string]int        `json:"error_types,omitempty"`
 }
 
 // AgentStats holds per-agent-type statistics.
 type AgentStats struct {
-	Count      int `json:"count"`
-	Prompts    int `json:"prompts"`
-	CharsSent  int `json:"chars_sent"`
-	TokensEst  int `json:"tokens_estimated"`
+	Count     int `json:"count"`
+	Prompts   int `json:"prompts"`
+	CharsSent int `json:"chars_sent"`
+	TokensEst int `json:"tokens_estimated"`
 }
 
 // SessionSummary provides details about a single session.
 type SessionSummary struct {
-	Name       string    `json:"name"`
-	CreatedAt  time.Time `json:"created_at"`
-	AgentCount int       `json:"agent_count"`
-	PromptCount int      `json:"prompt_count"`
+	Name        string    `json:"name"`
+	CreatedAt   time.Time `json:"created_at"`
+	AgentCount  int       `json:"agent_count"`
+	PromptCount int       `json:"prompt_count"`
 }
